title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.220 - Suit on bond
text:
237.220.  Suit on bond. — Upon the failure of any ferryman to perform any duty herein required, the attorney general or prosecuting attorney for the county shall commence and prosecute an action on the bond given by the ferryman, and the recovery of any penalty shall be no bar to any action on such bond.
(RSMo 1939 § 15302) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14214; 1919 § 5548; 1909 § 6491
